coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 4-group, 58-node closure.
validation: Five tail-length and tail-width cases match Blender topology exactly with identical four-decimal local bounds. Restoring the seven-point seed mesh at source float32 precision, its seven stored edges in authored order, and the original edge-domain tail masks removes the former 0.0007-unit tail drift while keeping both deformation controls live in-browser. The Mesh to Curve control polygon matches Blender within 2.8e-9 units and the authored evaluated point sets are mutually within 0.0000358 units; the residual is curve-frame arithmetic rather than topology or envelope.

materialParity.validation: Both direct Background to Material Output graphs now use the generic browser Background material rather than the normalized geometry fallback.
